# Titanic Survival Prediction

## Project Overview
Predicted survival of Titanic passengers using machine learning.
Competition: [Kaggle Titanic](https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/titanic)

## Score
- Version 1: 74.6% accuracy
- Version 2: XX% accuracy (after feature engineering)

## Approach
1. Exploratory Data Analysis — analysed survival by age, sex, class
2. Feature Engineering — created Title, FamilySize, AgeBand, FareBand
3. Model — Random Forest Classifier (sklearn)

## Key Findings
- Women survived at 74%, men at 19%
- 1st class passengers survived more than 3rd class
- Children under 12 had higher survival rates

## Files
- `Sink in with Titanic.ipynb` — main notebook
- `submission.csv` — Kaggle submission file

## Tools
Python, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Scikit-learn
